description: Tag delete (Capability Destroy). The confirm-only bypass gate and the bypass-without-confirm rejection agree; a path-unsafe tag_label is now rejected in both languages (Python gained Go's check; the bypass flags let both reach the handler check).

cases.name: confirm alone requires a bypass assertion
cases.expect_error:
linode_tag_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)

cases.name: bypass without confirm is rejected
cases.expect_error: confirm_bypass_dry_run only takes effect with confirm: true

cases.name: deletes a tag once confirmed with bypass
